scope: Retrospective project close duplicate/retry and audit cleanliness.
expected: After a successful close, a duplicate/retry close for the same already-closed project should return the existing closure read model with the original auditEventId, should not create another snapshot/lesson/action set, and should not append a project.close_conflict failure audit.

redEvidence.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/backendManagementLoop.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate project closure retry"
redEvidence.observed: Failed before fix: the retry close response returned 409 instead of 200 and was routed through the project_not_closable conflict path.

actual: Pass: first close returns 200; retry close returns 200 with the same snapshot id and same top-level auditEventId; audit readback contains exactly one project.closed and no project.close_conflict.
codeChanges: apps/api/src/retrospectiveRoutes.ts now requires getRetrospectiveReadModel for close, reads existing closure when the project is already closed, and returns the existing read model before appending failure audit.
apps/api/src/retrospectiveRoutes.ts also maps repository project_not_closable races to existing closure readback when a snapshot already exists.
apps/api/src/backendManagementLoop.db.test.ts adds DB/API coverage for duplicate project close retry with audit readback.

verification.command: DATABASE_URL=<local-test-db> node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/backendManagementLoop.db.test.ts -t "keeps duplicate project closure retry"
verification.notes: Vitest emitted the existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.
First sandboxed attempt hit esbuild spawn EPERM; rerun outside sandbox passed. Same pre-existing planning commandReducer warning.

coverageImpact: Covers the retrospective project close retry/race atom inside RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY at DB/API level. It does not close unrelated meeting create/link/note or task comment atoms.
